mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `join` WHERE DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(JOIN_ADD_TIME / 1000)) = CURDATE() AND JOIN_STATUS = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `join` WHERE DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(JOIN_ADD_TIME / 1000)) = CURDATE() AND JOIN_STATUS = 1 AND JOIN_IS_CHECKIN = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `join` WHERE DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(JOIN_ADD_TIME / 1000)) = CURDATE() AND JOIN_STATUS = 1 AND JOIN_IS_CHECKIN = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `join` WHERE JOIN_STATUS = 1 AND JOIN_IS_CHECKIN = 3 AND JOIN_ADD_TIME >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)) * 1000
SELECT * FROM `join` WHERE JOIN_STATUS = 1 AND JOIN_IS_CHECKIN = 0 AND JOIN_START_TIME < UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) * 1000

SELECT j.*, t.TIME_START as JOIN_MEET_TIME_START, t.TIME_END as JOIN_MEET_TIME_END FROM `join` j LEFT JOIN identity i ON j.IDENTITY_ID = i.IDENTITY_ID LEFT JOIN time t ON j.TIME_MARK = t.TIME_MARK WHERE (i.IDENTITY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.IDENTITY_CARD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY j.JOIN_ADD_TIME DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `join` WHERE JOIN_STATUS = 1 AND JOIN_IS_CHECKIN = 3 AND JOIN_MEET_DAY BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
mapper.update: UPDATE `join` SET JOIN_IS_CHECKIN = 3, JOIN_EDIT_TIME = #{editTime} WHERE JOIN_STATUS = 1 AND JOIN_IS_CHECKIN = 0 AND JOIN_MEET_DAY < DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d')
mapper.select: SELECT j.*, t.TIME_START as JOIN_MEET_TIME_START, t.TIME_END as JOIN_MEET_TIME_END FROM `join` j LEFT JOIN time t ON j.TIME_MARK = t.TIME_MARK WHERE j.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY j.JOIN_ADD_TIME DESC
